defs: Matching any one in marriage under his or her degree; injurious union with something of inferior excellence; a lowering in rank or estimation.
quotes: And thought that match a foul disparagement.

defs: Injurious comparison with an inferior; a depreciating or dishonoring opinion or insinuation; diminution of value; dishonor; indignity; reproach; disgrace; detraction; -- commonly with to.
quotes: It ought to be no disparagement to a star that it is not the sun.
Imitation is a disparagement and a degradation in a Christian minister.
